creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Minsoo Choo from comment #1)

Thanks, and please note that this pervasive issue is not content-related. 

Another example. 

Under <https://www.freebsd.org/where/#_freebsd_12_4_stable>, these two have different levels: 

> FreeBSD 12.4-STABLE

> Installation

– however there is no visible difference.
